title: Spark (Scala)
excerpt: description: Build a Scala Spark application that connects to R2 Data Catalog for Iceberg table operations. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Below is an example of how you can build an [Apache Spark ↗](https://spark.apache.org/) application (with Scala) which connects to R2 Data Catalog. This application is built to run locally, but it can be adapted to run on a cluster. * Sign up for a [Cloudflare account ↗](https://dash.cloudflare.com/sign-up/workers-and-pages).
